title: Yaganti Temple
tagline: Yaganti Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Yaganti Temple or Sri Yaganti Uma Maheswara Temple is a temple of Shiva in Nandyal district in the India state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Yaganti Temple or Sri Yaganti Uma Maheswara Temple is a temple of Shiva in Nandyal district in the India state of Andhra Pradesh. It was built according to Vaishnavaite traditions.

topPlaces.name: Yagantipalle
topPlaces.description: Yagantipalle is a village in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is located 74 kilometres (46 mi) south of Kurnool town.

items.note: Yagantipalle is a village in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is located 74 kilometres (46 mi) south of Kurnool town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yaganti Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yaganti Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yaganti Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (230 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yaganti Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yaganti Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yaganti Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Yaganti Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
